spell.heroic_spirit_spell.holy_slash.des: Release a holy blade that applies Guided to targets for 3 seconds.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.holy_rush.desc: Dash along your look direction and slash; immune to fall damage until you land.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.holy_shield.de: Hold to project a holy barrier in front of you. Releasing dismisses it and lets it recover over time.
spell.heroic_spirit_spell.holy_shield.re: You must be holding a shield to cast this spell.
